memories.content: Aetheria is a sovereign-by-code digital nation with structured agency governance.
Mirrors LatticeMemoryAdapter store/retrieve/list/shiftLayer and FilePersistenceAdapter checkpoint pattern in local JSON. Prototype only — not a TS integration.
Hermes Agent by Nous Research powers the digital-nation agent layer, providing skills, profiles, and memory infrastructure.
continue cross-repo integration after bridge validation
